center.name: 瓜亚基尔湾
center.summary: 瓜亚基尔湾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Lilacine amazon，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lilacine amazon is native to the tropical dry forests of western Ecuador north of the Gulf of Guayaquil, extending to Nariño in extreme south-western Colombia adjacent to the Ecuadorian border, where it intersects with the subspecies A

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The lilacine amazon is native to the tropical dry forests of western Ecuador north of the Gulf of Guayaquil, extending to Nariño in extreme south-western Colombia adjacent to the Ecuadorian border, where it intersects with the subspecies A
